title: Vector dimension mismatch in Supabase Vector Store
symptom: When trying to insert vectors into the Supabase Vector Store, n8n throws a 400 Bad Request error indicating a dimension mismatch.
not_this_if: Using a different node or integration
root_cause: The error occurs because the dimensionality of the vectors generated by the embedding model does not match the expected dimensionality defined in the Supabase table. This mismatch leads to a failure in the insertion process.
fix_steps: Check the dimensionality of the vectors generated by the embedding model.
If the vectors are 2048 dimensions, update the Supabase table to accept 2048 dimensions.
Alternatively, adjust the embedding model to generate 1536-dimensional vectors.
agent_instruction: Ensure the dimensionality of the vectors matches the Supabase table definition.
